title: User Agreement
intro: This Agreement describes the rules for using the social-media-v1 service and the mutual obligations of the parties.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance
body: By using the Service, the User confirms they have read and agree to this Agreement, the Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptable use
body: It is prohibited to use the Service for spam, disinformation, artificial engagement or circumventing social network rules.
Content that violates the law, third-party rights or belongs to prohibited niches is not allowed.

sections.heading: 3. User content
body: The User retains rights to their content and grants the Provider the right to process it solely to operate the Service.
Content passes automated moderation before publishing; final responsibility lies with the User.

sections.heading: 4. Suspension and blocking
body: On breach of this Agreement, access may be limited: warning, suspension, account block.
The Provider notifies the User of the reasons unless prohibited by law.

sections.heading: 5. Changes
body: The Provider may amend this Agreement with prior notice via the Service or by email.
